title: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
friendlyTitle: A job-search helper built around Claude Code
summary: A popular Claude Code-based job application framework that helps evaluate job listings, tailor CVs, draft cover letters, and prepare interview material from a personal profile.
friendlySummary: This repo helps with job applications by reviewing roles, tailoring resumes, writing cover letters, and preparing for interviews.
whyItMatters: Job seekers can fork it and adapt the workflow for a more systematic application process. It is also a concrete example of turning a repetitive personal workflow into an agent-guided pipeline.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help people organize job hunting and shows how AI can automate repeated personal admin work.
howItsUseful: Job seekers can fork it and adapt the workflow for a more systematic application process. It is also a concrete example of turning a repetitive personal workflow into an agent-guided pipeline.
friendlyHowItsUseful: It can help people organize job hunting and shows how AI can automate repeated personal admin work.
